title: Ensure readResolve methods are inheritable
description: The readResolve method is used during deserialization to replace the deserialized object with another object. For this mechanism to work properly in inheritance hierarchies, the readResolve method should not be private.
recommendation: Make readResolve methods protected or public instead of private.
impact: Ensures proper deserialization behavior in inheritance hierarchies.

checks.message: readResolve method should not be private
